_comment: Prophesy Shortlist save bundle. Created via the Save button in the Shortlist tab.

strengths.title: Secondary PNR Handler Skill
strengths.description: Owen showcases excellent feel and ability for his size in handling in the PNR, able to create his own shot in a variety of ways.

strengths.title: Technical Handle - Agility
strengths.description: High-level advantage creator. Great change of pace and very flexible, slippery ball handler. Able to create separation with or without a ball-screen. Almost unpressurable, retains dribble through pressure.

strengths.title: PNR Guile
strengths.description: Able to manipulate defenses with his stop-start ability in the PNR and use of tempo. Smartly uses ball screens. Excellent passer to rollers/PNPers.

strengths.title: Court Vision + Pass-On-The-Move
strengths.description: Seamless pass-on-the-move ability off-handle. Great court mapping and ability to kick-out to shooters.

strengths.title: Floater Touch
strengths.description: Likes to low gather into spots in the paint to fire off his floater. Acceptable touch (45FG%).

weaknesses.title: Skinniness
weaknesses.description: Low body weight and lack of good vertical ability makes his finishing ability around the rim questionable - and lessens the amount of pressure he's able to exert downhill against larger teams despite his exceptional advantage creation ability.

weaknesses.title: Shot Making
weaknesses.description: Mediocre level of shot-maker off-the-dribble, coupled with his limitations as a slasher/finisher can make scoring avenues tough if defenses ask him to be a scorer.

strengths.title: 3PT Shot-Making
strengths.description: Kobe has the ability to consistently make tough shots from behind the arc with a hand in his face. Crafty off-the-dribble game from 3, with a plethora of step-backs/pull-ups/side-step 3's in his arsenal. Loves to get a step on his man with his fast first-step, and then  misdirect with a step-back from deep.

strengths.title: Off-Ball Gravity/Handoff Threat
strengths.description: With Kobe's tough shotmaking ability from behind the arc, it makes it exceptionally difficult to help off of him. Likes to relocate on the perimeter for C&S opportunities. Dangerous running off of screens & pulling from handoff/get opportunities.

strengths.title: Drives for Kick-Outs/Speed
strengths.description: Very quick first-step, with solid core strength to maintain balance with a defender on his hip - doesn't shy away from physicality. Has a full-speed cross that's tough to cover. His speed draws in help - where he remains heads up, very willing to pass out, and exploits help with kick-outs to shooters.

strengths.title: PNR Playmaking - Roller
strengths.description: Had great synergy with his 5-man at Leverkusen - finding him for easy looks, hitting him frequently.

weaknesses.title: Finishing/Size/Level of Control
weaknesses.description: Despite the decent level of physicality he plays with around the rim and straight-line speed, Kobe can struggle to finish in traffic due to his size/lack of length and mediocre level of touch at the rim. Often plays at one speed (full-speed) going downhill, which can occasionally lead to out-of-control moments at the rim.

weaknesses.title: Shot Selection
weaknesses.description: Had a solid TS% (56%) at Leverkusen buoyed by his shot-making ability from 3, but can be trigger happy on tough looks. Due to his propensity behind the arc, for stretches he can settle from 3 - leading to, occasionally, some possessions with not a lot of ball movement. Due to his size/lack of multiple speeds (and tendency to take tough looks from deep), his shot diet can be very tough.

weaknesses.title: Off-Ball Defense/Inconsistent Motor
weaknesses.description: Kobe can sometimes be caught ball-watching, losing his man. Defensive motor can vary.

strengths.title: Handle/Advantage Creation/Control
strengths.description: Loves to Nash dribble - keeps his dribble alive for the best opportunity (assist/scoring) possible, playing with a high degree of patience. Fluid, agile athlete with a very tight handle that looks to navigate tight spaces inside the arc for assist-opportunities. Remains constantly under control, with a deceptive use of change-of-pace and hesi's. Very slippery.

strengths.title: 3PT/Mid Shot-Making
strengths.description: Good shot-maker - able to hit both off-the-dribble or C&S with high degrees of difficulty. Relocates when off-ball for his shot - good at hitting running off-screens or in hand-offs. Can curl into his floater/mid.

strengths.title: Court-Vision/Pass-On-The-Move/PNR Probing
strengths.description: Seamless passer off dribble. Cerebral PNR operator with great court vision and very pass-first mentality, able to hit tight window passes while he probes the defense looking for gaps.

strengths.title: Defense/Smarts
strengths.description: Despite his small size, his ability to navigate screens with his level of agility and motor is at a very good level. Uses verticality and his body very well as a defender, making shots difficult. Remains aware off-ball, with good close-out defense,

strengths.title: Floater Touch
strengths.description: Almost automatic if he gets enough space in the paint. Great touch on extended-range touch shots, able to hit contested looks.

weaknesses.title: Threat Inside The Arc/Spot-Ups
weaknesses.description: Due to his small-size and diminuitive frame, it can be tough for Rylan to generate space inside the arc for his own shot. Limited threat at the rim unless wide open/has a step on his man. Often has to Nash dribble instead of finish at the rim. If he can't separate with his speed, it can be a struggle. Often has to pass up C&S spot-up opportunities on the perimeter due to his low release point.

weaknesses.title: Frame/Strength
weaknesses.description: Due to his small frame, he's a threat to be pinned by larger players in the post. Very small effective height with his negative wingspan and low body weight. Little margin for error defensively - close-to-zero impact contesting shots (has to do his work early), or ability to defend from behind the play. If a screen makes contact, it can take him out of the play.

strengths.title: Straight-Line Drive Craft & Speed/Finishing
strengths.description: Very fast downhill with a quick first step - and uses change-of-pace/hesi's smartly to throw defenders off-balance. Likes to reject the ball-screen and exploit his speed. Uses footwork and craft around the rim to alter the timing of shot-blockers/draw fouls. Great on curl actions where he can exploit his speed to the rim. Finds a way to finish in traffic.

strengths.title: Foul Grifting
strengths.description: Very smart at drawing fouls around the rim if he senses he's in a bad position/defender out of legal guarding position, with clever use of footwork/gather.

strengths.title: Movement/Aggression Off-The-Catch/Hand-Offs
strengths.description: Relocates off-ball when he passes off, creating a constant flow of offense with his straight-line drive ability off-the-catch, level of aggression and passing ability. Crafty movement on  hand-offs, where he can leverage his speed downhill for looks at the rim/passing opportunities. Attacks full-speed off-the-catch, also incorporating stampede cuts to the rim. Likes to play get with his 5-man vs. holding the ball for too long.

strengths.title: Drive & Kick Ability
strengths.description: Leverages his fearless, aggressive drives to the rim into points for others. Willing passer out to shooters.

strengths.title: Anticipation on Defense
strengths.description: Sometimes played in a free-safety-esque role off-ball on the weakside, Sam racks up a lot of steals with his anticipation, where he's great at denying the pass to the screener. Quick hands on-ball gets strips.

strengths.title: Switching
strengths.description: Fights hard on the mismatch, solid physically and frame.

weaknesses.title: Outside Shotmaking
weaknesses.description: Mainly only a threat on open C&S opportunities. Inconsistent shot if the defense goes under on ball screens.

weaknesses.title: Left-Side Finishing
weaknesses.description: Still very capable, but weaker finishing to the left-side (weaker touch if he goes with his left, likes the reverse lay-up)

weaknesses.title: High-Level PG Skills
weaknesses.description: Not completely perfect court-vision, can occasionally miss passing opportunities. Low turnover rate but occasionally can get stripped.

weaknesses.title: Length
weaknesses.description: Short wingspan and height. Helped often by a Nebraska liberal help defense scheme as a 1-on-1 defender.

strengths.title: P&R Play/Foul Drawing
strengths.description: Loves to probe and play patient in the P&R. Creates great looks for his 5-man. Draws a lot of fouls. Uses his frame to hold defenders on his back.

strengths.title: Change of Speed/Shiftiness/Dynamism Downhill
strengths.description: Creates looks at the rim in the P&R through his stop-start style of play, which exploits his quick change of pace. Bursty, with quick change of direction.

strengths.title: Straight-Line Drive Ability
strengths.description: Quick first-step, physicality and handles on the move make him a tough threat attacking off-the-catch/if the defense give him a lane to the rim. Great at dump-off/lob passes to bigs in the dunker spot. Decent floater touch. Occasional mid-range step-back counter (although inconsistent).

strengths.title: Passing Vision/Pass to the Big
strengths.description: Mixes his scoring threat downhill with a willingness to pass to shooters, with good vision.

strengths.title: Frame/Point-Of-Attack Defense
strengths.description: Solid, strong frame at 205lbs which he uses effectively. Applies a lot of ball pressure defensively.

strengths.title: Hands/Steals
strengths.description: Very quick hands and anticipation off-ball. Very disruptive defender.

weaknesses.title: Finishing/Touch
weaknesses.description: Inconsistent finisher, weaker touch on contested looks around the basket

weaknesses.title: FT%
weaknesses.description: Draws a lot of fouls in the paint, but can struggle to convert at the line (around 60% on his career).

weaknesses.title: Inconsistent Shot (3PT/Mid)
weaknesses.description: Weaker shooter from the outside - I don't think he's as bad as the 25-27% from 3 the past couple seasons, but still shot 31% from deep his last fully healthy season.

weaknesses.title: Injury
weaknesses.description: Previous two seasons were cut short due to injury.

weaknesses.title: TOs
weaknesses.description: Can be occasionally TO prone (pass selection/losing his handle).

strengths.title: Self-Creation/Iso/Extending Advantages
strengths.description: Able to create his own shot - either downhill, in the mid-range or from deep using his level of ball skill and shotmaking off-dribble/combination of athleticism and physicality. Able to size-up his man, create an advantage off-dribble and pass off with a level of decision making. Extends advantages with decision making off-the-catch. Can even initiate play on occasion.

strengths.title: Physicality/Strength/Speed
strengths.description: Very strong player, especially for a man with his level of skill. Mismatch problem vs. smaller/weaker wings. Too quick for slower forwards.

strengths.title: Vertical
strengths.description: If given space to spring - he will dunk over guys.

strengths.title: Versatility
strengths.description: Very versatile defender. Very capable on guards. Has the size to defend in the post against 5's. Length is very impactful - gets blocks defending 1-on-1, or in recovery. Clogs up passing lanes.

weaknesses.title: Inconsistent C&S
weaknesses.description: Showcases some impressive shotmaking, including step-back 3 ability (and ultimately shot mid 30's for the season), but has a bit of a slow release and is streaky.

weaknesses.title: Court Vision
weaknesses.description: Flashes impressive passing ability and is willing as a passer - but can get tunnel-visioned on his drives occasionally.

weaknesses.title: Ball Watching
weaknesses.description: Sometimes can be caught ball-watching off-ball.

strengths.title: High-Level Passing
strengths.description: Elite passer for a player his size - will struggle to find anyone better at our level. Capable of running secondary PNR as a ball-handler and distributing out. Selfless connective passer, making extra passes, entry passes etc. where available. Excellent at extending advantages. Height enables him to pass from different angles vs. shorter players.

strengths.title: Ball Skill
strengths.description: Capable of running point for periods of time as a big Point-Forward. Capable in PNR as a playmaker. Flashes some occasional, simple off-the-dribble threat from deep as a ball=handler.

strengths.title: Pinning
strengths.description: Has a positive tendency to exploit his size if a small is placed on him, and pin players at the rim.

strengths.title: Bad Closeout Attacking
strengths.description: Capable of finishing plays if a defender overcommits to his shooting threat/out of position and he has a linear lane to the hoop.

weaknesses.title: Limited Scoring Craft/Handle
weaknesses.description: Relative slowness/lack of handles/agility can make it difficult for him to create advantages vs. defenders, or score on more complex drives to the rim (that involves ball pressure/low man waiting). Operates well off of curls/very linear drives.

weaknesses.title: Finishing On The Move
weaknesses.description: Touch can be lacking when contested at the rim.

weaknesses.title: Speed Defensively
weaknesses.description: Can be slow around screens/laterally.

strengths.title: C&S 3
strengths.description: Consistent 3PT threat from deep. Moves well off-ball to get his shot.

strengths.title: Post Scoring
strengths.description: Capable at scoring in the post, Good at passing off of his post threat.

strengths.title: Attacking Off-The-Catch
strengths.description: Level of fluidity attacking downhill, flashing wing skill.

weaknesses.title: Finishing
weaknesses.description: Mediocre touch around the basket.

strengths.title: Advantage Creation/Shiftiness/Slashing
strengths.description: Elite handles & quick burst. Incredibly tough to keep in front. Plays with physicality, strong at finishing through contests.

strengths.title: C&S Shotmaking
strengths.description: Able to hit exceedingly tough shots from deep off-screens.

weaknesses.title: Turnover Prone
weaknesses.description: Loose handle. Doesn't deal well with pressure.

strengths.title: Shiftiness/Creation Advantage/Speed
strengths.description: Exceedingly difficult to keep in front. Elite first step and very shifty handles. Very difficult to stop getting to the rim.

strengths.title: Shotmaking
strengths.description: Able to create looks off-dribble in the mid-range and hit contested shots.

strengths.title: Hands
strengths.description: Great, disruptive hands that he puts to use defensively.

weaknesses.title: Passing
weaknesses.description: Can miss passing opportunities. Can get tunnel visioned/opt for tough looks vs. pass.

strengths.title: Speed
strengths.description: Exceedingly fast PG looking to blitz defenders downhill and finish at the rim.

strengths.title: Pass On-The-Move
strengths.description: Capable passer off of his driving threat.

strengths.title: 3PT Shooting
strengths.description: Good off-the-bounce, capable of tough shotmaking.

weaknesses.title: Size
weaknesses.description: Small defensively despite his level of motor/activity.

strengths.title: Mobility
strengths.description: Switchable 5 with his level of size. Quick rim-roller and great at finding pockets of space in the paint for little touch shots. Great level of hands for steals.

strengths.title: Post Skill
strengths.description: Capable post=scorer against the size of ABA bigs. Has good touch in the post.
